title: Sprites, Groups, Update Contracts, Kill Semantics, and Entity Ownership · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent adaptive-arcade team receives a different viewport, device, frame rate, seed, entity count, accessibility profile, platform, and delivery constraint and transfers sprites, groups, update contracts, kill semantics, and entity ownership into a changed reconciled sprite and group lifecycle. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of reconciled sprite and group lifecycle with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theo…
objectives: Define image, rect or FRect, world position, update inputs, draw responsibility, and lifecycle for every Sprite subtype.
Use separate update, draw-layer, collision, projectile, hazard, and UI groups only when ownership and membership are explicit.
Keep group update inputs consistent or route context through an explicit system boundary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Sprite Contract
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Asteroids team handles case 5707 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile sprite creation, group membership, update and draw order, kill semantics, and entity ownership; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Define image, rect or FRect, world position, update inputs, draw responsibility, and lifecycle for every Sprite subtype.

Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-layered-groups-8vftdb
# Competency: asteroids-layered-groups.
# Case 2239: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def evidence_asteroids_layered_groups_8vftdb(created: int = 20, active: int = 13, killed: int = 7, group_memberships_released: bool = True, update_before_draw: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_8vftdb = "8vftdb-bdtfv8-2239"
    assert evidence_variant_8vftdb
    evidence_axes_8vftdb = (
        "player8vftdb",
        "seed2239",
        "inputbdtfv8",
        "frame8vftdb2239",
        "state22398vftdb",
        "playtestbdtfv82239",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_8vftdb)) == 6
    if min(created, active, killed) < 0:
        return False, active, "group-domain"
    if active + killed != created:
        return False, active, "lifecycle-reconciliation"
    if not group_memberships_released:
        return False, killed, "group-leak"
    if not update_before_draw:
        return False, active, "stale-render"
    assert active + killed == created
    return True, active, "owned-sprites"
